reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.subtitle: Access comprehensive reports to analyze your financial data
reports.aboutLine1: All reports are generated in real-time from your posted journal entries. Draft entries are not included in reports.
reports.aboutLine2: You can export reports to PDF or Excel formats, and use date range filters to analyze specific periods.
reports.aboutLine3: ðŸ’¡ AI-powered insights are available on each report to help you understand trends and anomalies.

trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.description: Summary of all account balances to verify debits equal credits

generalLedger.title: General Ledger
generalLedger.description: Detailed transaction history for individual accounts

profitLoss.title: Profit & Loss
profitLoss.description: Income statement showing revenue, expenses, and net income

balanceSheet.title: Balance Sheet
balanceSheet.description: Snapshot of assets, liabilities, and equity at a specific date

setup.title: Set Up Accounting
setup.subtitle: Configure your accounting settings and chart of accounts to get started
setup.baseCurrencyHelp: The primary currency for your accounting records
setup.fiscalYearHelp: When your fiscal year begins (affects period generation)
setup.periodLockingHelp: Prevent posting entries to closed periods (recommended for production use)
setup.chartOfAccountsDescription: Choose a pre-built template to start with (you can add more accounts later)

minimal.label: Minimal (5 accounts)
minimal.description: Basic setup for very simple accounting needs

freelancer.label: Freelancer (16 accounts)
freelancer.description: Ideal for independent contractors and consultants

standard.label: Standard (79 accounts) (Recommended)
standard.description: Full-featured chart of accounts for most businesses

next.title: What Happens Next
next.line1: Your selected chart of accounts template will be created with all predefined accounts
next.line2: 12 monthly accounting periods will be generated for the current fiscal year
next.line3: You can customize accounts, add new ones, and start creating journal entries
next.line4: All financial reports will be available immediately

billing.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate invoices? This will detach existing draft invoices for this month.

settings.title: Classes Settings
settings.description: Configure how class invoices are generated for this workspace.

prepaid.label: Invoice for current month (prepaid)
prepaid.description: Invoices are generated at the start of the month for scheduled sessions.

arrears.label: Invoice for previous month (arrears)
arrears.description: Invoices are generated at the start of the month for attended sessions.

manual.label: Manual Attendance
manual.description: Teachers must record attendance per session.

autoFull.label: Auto-Full Attendance
autoFull.description: When a session is marked done, all enrolled students are marked present automatically. Teachers can still edit if needed.

scheduled.label: Scheduled sessions
scheduled.description: Counts planned/done sessions in the billing month.

attended.label: Attended sessions
attended.description: Counts billable attendance on done sessions.

settings.title: Purchasing Settings
settings.autoPostBillHelp: Automatically create accounting entries when a vendor bill is posted
settings.autoPostPaymentHelp: Automatically create accounting entries when a payment is recorded
settings.duplicateDetectionHelp: Warn when a bill with the same vendor and reference already exists
settings.approvalRequiredHelp: Vendor bills must be approved before they can be posted
